wargear.en: This model’s master-crafted power weapon can be replaced with 1 Astartes chainsword.
This model’s combi-weapon can be replaced with 1 heavy bolt pistol.

fluff.en: A Castellan leads each of a crusade’s Fighting Companies and acts as a conduit for their Marshal’s will. Charged with the physical and spiritual purity of active Chapter Keeps, they have honed a patient wisdom that they draw upon in battle, alongside their tactical precision and close-quarters ferocity.

description.en: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a Chaplain Grimaldus model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

In your Command phase, if this unit contains one or more Cenobyte Servitor models, select one Temple Relics ability (see Temple Relics section). Until the start of your next Command phase, this unit’s Chaplain Grimaldus model has that ability.
Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.
Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in this unit.

name.en: Water from the Stoup of Elucidation

description.en: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

loadout.en:
* *If this unit’s Chaplain GrimaIdus model is ever destroyed, all af this unit’s remaining Cenabyte Servitor models are also destroyed. While embarking within a* **TRANSPORT** *and while embarked within a* **TRANSPORT,** *each Cenobyte Servitor model in this unit takes up the space of 0 models.*
**Chaplain Grimaldus is equipped with:** plasma pistol; artificer crozius.
**Every Cenobyte Servitor is equipped with:** close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: High Chaplain Grimaldus is a beacon of Imperial faith. His fortitude is such that many of his brothers believe him invincible. His will is singular, his zeal coldly furious, and his martial skill attested by the trail of broken foes laid at his heels. His Cenobyte Servitors lurch to war at his side, bearing with them holy relics of the faith.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **CRUSADER SQUAD** ■ **INFERNUS SQUAD** ■ **INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **SWORD BRETHREN**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

The first time a model in this model’s unit makes a melee attack that destroys one or more enemy units, until the end of the battle, while this model’s unit is not Battle-shocked, add 5 to this model’s Objective Control characteristic.

This model can be attached to the following units:

■ **CRUSADER SQUAD**
■ **SWORD BRETHREN**

composition.en: **This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; master-crafted power weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Carrying their crusade’s icons and sacred standards, these veteran wardens are honoured warriors of exceptional resolve and determination. They raise high the tapestries depicting the crusade’s victories and the God-Emperor’s glory, exhorting their fellow Black Templars to greater heights of weaponised hate.

description.en: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models in this unit were **destroyed** as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6+2".
If a **CHARACTER** from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an **INTERCESSOR SQUAD**, it can be attached to this unit instead.

loadout.en:
**The Primaris Sword Brother is equipped with:** heavy bolt pistol; master-crafted power weapon.
**Every Primaris Initiate is equipped with:** bolt pistol; bolt rifle; close combat weapon.
**Every Primaris Neophyte is equipped with:** bolt pistol; Astartes chainsword.

wargear.en: For every 10 models in this unit, up to 2 Initiates can each have their bolt rifle replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 heavy bolt pistol and 1 power fist ◦ 1 pyreblaster
Any number of Initiates can each have their bolt rifle replaced with 1 heavy bolt pistol and 1 Astartes chainsword.
Any number of Neophytes can each have their bolt pistol and Astartes chainsword replaced with 1 Neophyte firearm and 1 close combat weapon.
The Sword Brother’s heavy bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 pyre pistol.

fluff.en: Crusader Squads storm into battle with bolt rifles blazing and chainswords howling. Initiates aim jets of fire from their pyreblasters or swing crackling power fists into their foes, while hard-eyed Neophytes fight furiously to prove their martial worth under the stern gaze of their mentors.

description.en: Once per phase, when an attack is allocated to this model and the saving throw is failed, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

• When this unit declares a charge, If an enemy **CHARACTER** unit is within 12" of this unit, you can use this part of this ability. If you do:
    • This unit can re-roll that charge roll.
    • This unit must end that charge move engaged with one or more of those enemy **CHARACTER** units.
  • (Once per battle, per army) In the Fight phase, when this unit is selected to fight, if this unit is engaged with a **CHARACTER** unit, you can use this part of this ability. If you do, this unit's melee attacks have **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]**.
You cannot include more than one **EMPEROR’S CHAMPION** model in your army.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** bolt pistol; Black Sword.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: A humble warrior touched by greatness, the Emperor’s Champion strides to battle wreathed in divine light. The furious blows of the enemy ring from his nigh-impenetrable Armour of Faith. In return, the Emperor’s Champion seeks out the leaders of the foe and, with sweeping blows from his Black Sword, strikes them down.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **CRUSADER SQUAD** ■ **INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** ■ **SWORD BRETHREN**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
Each time this model’s unit has fought, if one or more enemy units were destroyed as a result of those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** absolver bolt pistol; crozius arcanum.

wargear.en: lf this model is equipped with an absolver bolt pistol, it can be equipped with 1 master-crafted power weapon (this model’s absolver bolt pistol cannot be replaced).
This model’s absolver bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 pyre pistol.

fluff.en: Execrators are living exemplars of their battle-brothers’ oaths, ferocious warrior priests who lead the Black Templars in lethal rampages. They teach that war is the most worthy chapel for warriors, every bludgeoning blow of their crozius arcanum punctuated with zealous invective and roared sermons.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **CRUSADER SQUAD** ■ **SWORD BRETHREN**

description.en: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Lancer laser destroyer; 2 storm bolters; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Icarus rocket pod.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 ironhail heavy stubber ◦ 1 multi-melta
This model’s 2 storm bolters can be replaced with 2 fragstorm grenade launchers.

fluff.en: With pinpoint accuracy, Gladiator Lancer crews use this battle tank’s laser destroyer to spear through the heaviest enemy armour and punch smouldering holes in the flesh of xenos monstrosities. Such is the range of its heavy cannon that it can eliminate threats to the Black Templars before their battle-brothers encounter them, storming past their wrecks to seek the next affront to the Emperor.

description.en: This model’s twin heavy onslaught gatling cannon has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability when targeting **INFANTRY** units.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 tempest bolters; twin heavy onslaught gatling cannon; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Icarus rocket pod.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 ironhail heavy stubber ◦ 1 multi-melta

fluff.en: When the cannons of the Gladiator Reaper spin to full pitch, the whining drone is likened to the sharpening of the Emperor’s just blade and a sensation which only truly discomforts the blasphemous. Within seconds, thousands of spent casings pour over the battle tank’s armoured hide as enemies are erased from existence by the storm of fire.

description.en: Each time this model makes an attack with its twin las-talon that targets the closest eligible **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 multi-meltas; twin las-talon; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Icarus rocket pod.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 ironhail heavy stubber ◦ 1 multi-melta

fluff.en: The Valiant lays down blistering volleys of holy fire as it escorts transports or supports infantry in ferocious fighting, executing singular threats and vaporising squads of heavily armoured heretics with equal ease. Its twin las-talons spit vindicated death at the foe, making short work of enemy armour, while its hissing multi-meltas turn fortified positions into bubbling slag.

name.en: Sword of the High Marshals – Sweep
Sword of the High Marshals – Strike

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for every five models in this model’s unit: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Ferocity; Sword of the High Marshals.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Helbrecht is the living embodiment of his Chapter’s warrior spirit. Wielding the Sword of the High Marshals, he storms into the fray, bellowing oaths of vengeance as he leads the unstoppable charge. His battle-brothers follow him without question, for they believe where High Marshal Helbrecht treads, so too walks the Emperor himself.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **CRUSADER SQUAD** ■ **INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **SWORD BRETHREN**

description.en: Units can disembark from this **TRANSPORT** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge that turn.
The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save.
While a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 storm bolters; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 bellicatus missile array ◦ 1 ironhail skytalon array ◦ 1 orbital comms array ◦ 1 shield dome
This model’s 2 storm bolters can be replaced with 2 fragstorm grenade launchers.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 ironhail heavy stubber ◦ 1 multi-melta

fluff.en: Equipped with vectored thrusters that grant it high speed, the Impulsor is a highly adaptable transport ideal for rapid insertion and flanking manoeuvres. The zealous vanguard forces of the Black Templars particularly favour it. The tank’s array of offensive and defensive systems enables it to support fiery purges, aggressive reconnaissance and oathsworn spearheads.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 7 **TACTICUS** or **PHOBOS INFANTRY** models. It cannot transport **JUMP PACK** models.

description.en: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this **TRANSPORT** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 hurricane bolters; twin assault cannon; armoured tracks.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 storm bolter.
This model can be equipped with 1 multi-melta.
This model can be equipped with 1 hunter-killer missile.

fluff.en: Developed from sacred archeotech and deployed by the Black Templars during the Jerulas Crusade, the Land Raider Crusader is a superlative assault tank. Its bulk can crush enemy defences, and its prodigious firepower cuts their guardians apart. Once it has stormed a position, Black Templars pour from its hatches to slaughter any who remain.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 16 **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** models. Each **JUMP PACK**, **GRAVIS** or **TERMINATOR** model takes up the space of 2 models and each **CENTURION** model takes up the space of 3 models.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s master-crafted power weapon for each enemy unit within 6" of this model (to a maximum of +3).

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** plasma pistol; master-crafted power weapon.

wargear.en: This model’s plasma pistol can be replaced with one combi-weapon.

fluff.en: Each Black Templars crusade is led by a Marshal. Similar in rank to the Captains of other Chapters, Marshals are fearsome combatants and paragons of strategic acumen. Ensuring a crusade’s purity and success is a sacred duty, and Marshals fight with sanctified relic weapons while acting as beacons of pious fervour for their warriors.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **CRUSADER SQUAD** ■ **INFERNUS SQUAD** ■ **INTERCESSOR SQUAD** ■ **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** ■ **SWORD BRETHREN**

description.en: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any of those attacks targeted this **TRANSPORT,** it can use this ability. If it does, any units embarked within it can disembark. When doing so, models in those units can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of this **TRANSPORT** and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** heavy onslaught gatling cannon; hunter-slayer missile; Repulsor defensive array; twin heavy bolter; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 multi-melta.
This model’s heavy onslaught gatling cannon can be replaced with 1 las-talon.
This model’s twin heavy bolter can be replaced with 1 twin lascannon.

fluff.en: Clad in advanced armour plating etched with the vows of its crew and armed for any battlefield situation, the Repulsor transports its vow-sworn occupants safely and provides deadly fire support. The tank’s ventral plates channel gravitic energies that crush obstacles and anchor its position, providing a stable disembarkation for those inside, even amidst heavy fire.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 14 **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** models. Each **JUMP PACK**, **GRAVIS** or **TERMINATOR** model takes up the space of 2 models and each **CENTURION** model takes up the space of 3 models.

description.en: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 12" of one or more **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** heavy onslaught gatling cannon; macro plasma incinerator; Repulsor Executioner defensive array; twin heavy bolter; twin Icarus ironhail heavy stubber; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with 1 Icarus rocket pod.
This model can be equipped with one of the following: ◦ 1 ironhail heavy stubber ◦ 1 multi-melta
This model’s macro plasma incinerator can be replaced with 1 heavy laser destroyer.

fluff.en: The Repulsor Executioner sacrifices some transport capacity to carry far more powerful weaponry. Armed with a blessed heavy laser destroyer, it can cripple enemy tanks, while the macro plasma incinerator can incinerate infantry formations. The Executioner’s crew are skilled in close-range support, combating threats to the rest of their fighting company with pinpoint interception strikes.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 7 **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** models. Each **JUMP PACK**, **GRAVIS** or **TERMINATOR** model takes up the space of 2 models and each **CENTURION** model takes up the space of 3 models.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** Sternguard bolt pistol; Sternguard bolt rifle; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Sternguard Veteran’s Sternguard bolt rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 pyrecannon ◦ 1 Sternguard heavy bolter
Any number of models can each have their Sternguard bolt rifle replaced with 1 combi-weapon.

The Sternguard Veteran Sergeant’s Sternguard bolt rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Astartes chainsword  ◦ 1 combi-weapon ◦ 1 power weapon ◦ 1 power fist ◦ 1 Astartes chainsword and 1 Sternguard bolt rifle* ◦ 1 power weapon and 1 Sternguard bolt rifle* ◦ 1 power fist and 1 Sternguard bolt rifle*  * This model’s Sternguard bolt rifle cannot be replaced.

fluff.en: A crusade’s Sternguard Veterans possess an unshakeable calm and are renowned for their unflinching marksmanship under extreme threat. Granted the use of a wide range of specialist ammunition and ranged relic weaponry, they unleash the God-Emperor’s judgement in pinpoint volleys that unerringly exploit the blasphemous enemies’ weaknesses.

description.en: Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit is selected to Fall Back, after it ends that Fall Back move, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move.
If a **CHARACTER** from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an **INTERCESSOR SQUAD**, it can be attached to this unit instead.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** heavy bolt pistol; Astartes chainsword.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Sword Brother’s heavy bolt pistol and Astartes chainsword can be replaced with 1 twin lightning claws.
For every 5 models in this unit, up to 2  Sword Brothers can each have their heavy bolt pistol replaced with 1 pyre pistol.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Sword Brother’s heavy bolt pistol can be replaced with 1 plasma pistol.
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Sword Brother’s Astartes chainsword can be replaced with 1 thunder hammer.
Any number of Sword Brothers can each have their Astartes chainsword replaced with 1 master-crafted power weapon.

fluff.en: Every Sword Brother has earned their place amongst the Marshal’s household through acts of unswerving faith and spectacular violence. On the battlefield they are a reaping whirlwind, unstoppable, uncompromising and armed with a lethal assortment of weapons that they turn upon the enemy in the Emperor’s name.

description.en: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" horizontally of that token and not within 8" horizontally of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

Each time an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** storm bolter; power fist.

wargear.en: The Terminator Squad Leader’s power fist can be replaced with 1 power weapon.
Any number of models can each have their power fist replaced with 1 chainfist.

For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Terminator’s storm bolter can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 assault cannon ◦ 1 heavy flamer ◦ 1 cyclone missile launcher and 1 storm bolter.*  * This model’s storm bolter cannot be replaced.

fluff.en: Each suit of Terminator armour is a precious relic that enables a Black Templar veteran to survive anything from teleportation to the blows of hulking xenos. Shards of the Emperor’s armour set into the suit are even said to ward away malefic witchery. So equipped, heavily armed Terminator Squads can appear amid the foe or stride openly towards them, firing their weapons all the while.
